title: Amblyanthe dielsiana
taxonomy: Amblyanthe dielsiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. It is commonly known as a parasitic plant due to its unique ability to obtain nutrients from surrounding plants. The plant is native to China and is classified within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Further classification includes the order Santalales, family Santalaceae, genus Amblyanthe, and species A. dielsiana. This classification places Amblyanthe dielsiana within the broader group of parasitic plants that rely on other plants for their nutrient needs.
